comment:
Changing status to `blocked` as we are currently waiting on responses from the Multipliers (via WhatsApp) or the first signs of telemetry activity to proceed further with adoption recovery. No further action can be taken by the CMO until then.

**Blocker Owner:** Wave 2 Multipliers
**Action Needed:** Reply to the WhatsApp check-in or successfully connect to the proxy to generate telemetry.
